text: G…õ babh…õt…õ k…õka nyia ka n…õ k…õf…ĒŐÄn…Ē g…õ baf…Ēn…Ē elu n…õ y…õishu ebeke…õ, bebu y…õ n…õ osi…õ shu, p…õ bad…õ v…Ēb…Ē…õ n…õ odze…Ėe…õ m…õ.
translated: If a child does something that pleases the parents, they should not be scolded, but should be encouraged to do more.

ref: After Peter had sent everyone out of the room, he knelt down and prayed. Then he turned to the body of Dorcas and said, ‚ÄúTabitha, get up!‚ÄĚ The woman opened her eyes, and when she saw Peter, she sat up.
text: Petro akakaŐÄ banun…Ē pete ebu n…õ buvuŐÉ…Ē m…õ, k…õl…õ edzu ekluisi esi p…õ ekulu kititiŐĀ ay…õ. K…õl…õ g…õ etsyina y…õam…õ akp…õ adz…õ …Ēk…Ē…Ē, etse…Ėe y…õas…õ, ‚ÄúTabita, l…Ē…õtitiŐĀ!‚ÄĚ Adal…õ y…õawuhuŐÉ…Ē k…õl…õ g…õ am…Ē Petro…Ē, al…Ē azaŐÉ kititiŐÄ.
translated: When Peter arrived, they took him to the upstairs room. All the widows stood around him crying and showing him the robes and other clothing that Dorcas had made while she was still with them. Peter sent them all out of the room; then he got down on his knees and prayed. Turning toward the dead woman, he said, ‚ÄúTabitha, get up.‚ÄĚ She opened her eyes, and seeing Peter she sat up.

ref: Now the chief priests have given him the power to come here and arrest anyone who worships in your name.‚ÄĚ
text: K…õl…õ aba …õk…õl…õ n…õŐÄ ohumi eden…Ē ban…ĒluŐÉazazaŐÉ agbagbla …Ēk…Ē as…õ t…õ ebevuŐÉ an…Ē ka nyia ka g…õekulu w…Ē…õnye…õ.‚ÄĚ
translated: The chief of the town said that if they do not give him the respect he deserves, he will not attend the festival.

ref: But to keep this thing from spreading, we will warn them never again to speak to anyone about the name of Jesus.‚ÄĚ
text: P…Ē t…õ kibui …õl…õ taay…õŐÄ…õ …Ēv…õ n…õ banun…Ē m…õ…õ, k…õl…õ s…õ b…Ēkp…õ …Ēsha k…Ē ban…Ē al…õ t…õŐÄ bat…õ ada…Ė…Ē kibui …õl…õ etse…Ėe ananaŐÄ n…õ kinye …õl…õ m…õ.
translated: If you do not take care of your health, you will spend all your money in the hospital trying to get it back.

ref: They arrived at Salamis and began to preach God's message in the synagogues. They also had John as a helper.
text: G…õ bediku Salami…õ, ba…Ė…Ē Owusoso Akaa nibui…õ n…õ Yudan…õ …õtsy…Ēak…Ē. Yohanes Marko azaŐÉ bal…õ …Ēbha p…õ azapl…õn…Ē al…õ.
translated: When Salami died, they took him to Owusoso Akaa near Yudane where they buried him. John Mark was the one who dug the grave for him.
